video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. 窗外闪电照亮房间, 玻璃上倒映出另一个林澈站在身后. Narration: "窗外闪电照亮房间，玻璃上倒映出另一个林澈站在身后。". 林澈 says: "别回头。". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. 林澈站在窗前，窗外闪电照亮房间，玻璃上倒映出另一个林澈站在身后，阴森氛围，冷色调，电影感. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S016/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
